Css Selectors

Finding elements using attributes 
find elements using index

Using real relations

Finding elements using parent
finding elements using child
finding elements using siblings
finding elements by creating long relations

Finding by Visual relations


Self, Real Relations, Visual Relations, Blind Index

Self: Using attributes
Real Relations: 

Visual Relations given by playwright not CSS Selectors
playwright enhanced CSS and added some more features


// playwright Selectors
getByRole Locators
GetByText

page.getByLabel("Name:")
page.getByTitle("Python Tutorial").hover()


Identification: Use the information provided by Dev
If dev follows UI standards and Accessibility Standards, it will be easy for test automation

The problem is even if they dont follow, it still works
